ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cluster the country belongs to */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code for the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "area_km2" INTEGER /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "healthcare_index" REAL /* Index representing the quality of healthcare in the country */,
  "economic_status" TEXT /* Economic status of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_cluster_id FOREIGN KEY ("cluster_id") REFERENCES clusters ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clusters" (
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cluster */,
  "cluster_name" TEXT /* Name of the cluster */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cluster */,
  "geographic_region" TEXT /* Geographic region the cluster represents */,
  "economic_region" TEXT /* Economic region the cluster represents */,
  "healthcare_region" TEXT /* Healthcare region the cluster represents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covid_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the data belongs to */,
  "new_cases_per_million" REAL /* Number of new cases per million population */,
  "reproduction_rate" REAL /* Reproduction rate of the virus */,
  "icu_patients_per_million" REAL /* Number of ICU patients per million population */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was reported */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of confirmed cases */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths */,
  "total_tests" INTEGER /* Total number of tests conducted */,
  "total_vaccinations" INTEGER /* Total number of vaccinations administered */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Vaccination rate per 100 people */,
  "hospital_occupancy_rate" REAL /* Percentage of hospital beds occupied */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data entry, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., Daily, Weekly, Monthly) */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., Draft, Published, Archived) */,
  "file_size_kb" INTEGER /* Size of the report file in kilobytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_reports_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
